nodes.title: Rhythm & Grace Dance Studio
nodes.heroTitle: Where Every Step Tells a Story

heroDescription.processed: From first steps to center stage, we nurture dancers of all ages and abilities in a creative, supportive environment. Discover the joy of movement with our world-class instructors.

description.processed: Ballet, contemporary, hip hop, jazz, salsa, and more under one roof.
Teachers with Broadway, international competition, and conservatory backgrounds.
Annual showcases, community events, and competition teams for all ages.
Programs for children, teens, adults, and seniors at every skill level.
Sprung floors, mirrors, professional sound, and climate-controlled rooms.
A warm, supportive environment where dancers inspire each other.

ctaDescription.processed: New students receive a free trial class in any style. No experience necessary -- just bring your enthusiasm and comfortable clothing.
